name: foundation-integrity
description: Foundation-integrity skills for agent-driven engineering — a companion to workflow skill packs that adds the missing gate: prove the foundation is sound before building on it.

plugins.name: foundation-integrity
plugins.description: A foundation gate, an independent adversarial review, and a cumulative health audit — the checks that stop agents from cementing features onto a weak foundation. Composes with Matt Pocock's skills; requires none of them.
